text:
Scenario:
- FreeBSD stable/14
- ports latest

Result:
- The patch databases/postgresql16-server/files/patch-disable-llvm-jit-inlining-with-tls is unneeded because already in the upstream source (it applies and results in the same code fragment being twice in the file, which is benign but useless).

-- Martin
